## [03:02 - 06:03]

as well. So that's something which you're going to have to test with a small budget and see. And you might do this as a split test. So using Facebook split test tool so that you can actually split the budget completely in half. So half will only see one type of ad or offer and the other half will only see one other type as well. That's probably the safest way of making sure that if you are going to test the offer out, you're not crossing the offer between the audiences because like if you use two ads in an ad set or you split the ad set, people will see whichever offer Facebook serves them up. So running a split test will allow you to do that offer test and just see if that impacts your conversion rate, your ROAS and CPA and maybe just run out on like a few hundred dollars a day just to see what the reaction is to that.
